protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: Cells were harvested by centrifugation and disrupted with lysis-buffer... 1% SDS

protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: The suspension was centrifuged... Resin was washed... washing buffer... 1% NP-40

protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: Total lysate and other washing/elution fractions were heated at 95°C for 5 min for denaturation.

protocols.Paper_title: Expression and purification of a functional human hepatitis B virus polymerase
protocols.Evidence: The recombinant plasmid pT7-Pol was purified with Qiagen Midiprep DNA purification kit.
